metadata.name: launchpad
metadata.description: Solana Token Launchpad with Bonding Curve

instructions.name: buy
docs: Buy tokens from the bonding curve (with anti-snipe checks)

accounts.name: wallet_profile
docs: Wallet profile for trust scoring - auto-created if needed

instructions.name: claim_order
docs: Claim tokens from a settled batch auction

instructions.name: close_config
docs: Close config account (admin only, for migration)

instructions.name: close_graduated_curve
docs: Close a graduated bonding curve (admin only, for recovery)

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury token account to receive any remaining tokens

instructions.name: create_token
docs: Create a new token with bonding curve and anti-snipe protection

instructions.name: graduate
docs: Graduate token to Meteora DLMM when threshold is reached

accounts.name: bonding_curve
docs: close = treasury transfers all lamports to treasury and zeros the account

accounts.name: bonding_curve_token_account
docs: Bonding curve's token account (holds remaining tokens for liquidity)

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury account to receive SOL for pool creation (config.authority)

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury token account to receive tokens for liquidity

instructions.name: register_wallet
docs: Register wallet profile for trust scoring

instructions.name: sell
docs: Sell tokens back to the bonding curve (with lock checks)

accounts.name: settler
docs: Anyone can settle after batch ends

instructions.name: submit_buy_order
docs: Submit buy order to batch auction (during anti-snipe period)

accounts.name: oracle
docs: Oracle authority that can update trust scores

errors.name: BatchAuctionActive
errors.msg: Batch auction active - use submit_buy_order instead

errors.name: AntiSnipeActive
errors.msg: Anti-snipe features are active - restrictions apply

errors.name: WalletTooNew
errors.msg: Wallet too new - minimum age required

fields.name: enabled
docs: Whether anti-snipe is enabled for this token

fields.name: max_wallet_bps
docs: Maximum wallet holding in basis points (100 = 1% of supply)

fields.name: lock_duration
docs: Lock duration for purchased tokens (in seconds)

fields.name: max_wallet_bps
docs: Max wallet in basis points (100 = 1% of supply)

fields.name: lock_duration
docs: Lock duration in seconds (0 = no lock)

fields.name: batch_duration
docs: Batch auction duration in seconds (0 = disabled)

fields.name: bonding_curve
docs: The bonding curve this auction is for

fields.name: total_sol_committed
docs: Total SOL committed in this batch

fields.name: settlement_price
docs: Final price (tokens per SOL after settlement)

types.name: BondingCurve
docs: Bonding curve state for a token

fields.name: real_sol_reserves
docs: Real SOL reserves (actual SOL in the curve)

fields.name: real_token_reserves
docs: Real token reserves (tokens available for purchase)

fields.name: tokens_purchased
docs: Total tokens ever purchased from curve

fields.name: graduated
docs: Whether the token has graduated to DEX

fields.name: current_batch_id
docs: Current batch auction ID (increments each batch)

types.name: BuyOrder
docs: Individual buy order in a batch auction

fields.name: batch_auction
docs: The batch auction this order belongs to

fields.name: platform_lp_fee
docs: Platform LP fee taken (1% of total liquidity in SOL)

fields.name: meteora_pool
docs: Meteora DLMM pool address (placeholder until CPI integration)

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that can update config and withdraw fees

fields.name: platform_lp_fee_bps
docs: Platform LP fee in basis points (100 = 1%) - taken from LP at graduation

fields.name: graduation_threshold
docs: SOL threshold to graduate to DEX (in lamports)

fields.name: anti_snipe_enabled
docs: Whether anti-snipe features are globally enabled

fields.name: first_seen
docs: First interaction timestamp in this protocol

fields.name: trust_score
docs: Trust score (0-100), set by oracle or calculated

fields.name: civic_verified
docs: Whether wallet has passed Civic verification
